media_buy_id.description: Seller's unique identifier for the media buy

account.description: Account billed for this media buy

rejection_reason.description: Reason provided by the seller when status is 'rejected'. Present only when status is 'rejected'.

confirmed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the seller confirmed this media buy. A successful create_media_buy response constitutes order confirmation.

cancellation.description: Cancellation metadata. Present only when status is 'canceled'.

canceled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this media buy was canceled.

canceled_by.description: Which party initiated the cancellation. 'buyer' when canceled via update_media_buy; 'seller' when the seller cancels (e.g., policy violation, inventory withdrawal).

reason.description: Reason provided when the media buy was canceled.

packages.description: Array of packages within this media buy

invoice_recipient.description: Per-buy override for who receives the invoice. When provided, the seller invoices this entity instead of the account's default billing_entity. The seller MUST validate the invoice recipient is authorized for this account. When governance_agents are configured, the seller MUST include invoice_recipient in the check_governance request.

creative_deadline.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for creative upload deadline

revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number. Incremented on every state change or update. Callers MAY include this in update_media_buy requests for optimistic concurrency — sellers MUST reject with CONFLICT if the provided revision does not match the current value.
